violations.text: The back hand-washing sink was blocked by a rolling cart. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The floors throughout the back area of the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
